item.description:
What's New

  • Out of Credits Notification - The application now displays a clear, user-friendly message when credits run out, rather than a generic server error.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed an issue that could cause the application to freeze or hang when starting or using dictation.
  • Fixed overlay panel display behavior when using full-screen applications.
  • Fixed an issue with the meeting recording animation.

What's New

  • Improved AirPods and Bluetooth Audio Support - Enhanced audio input handling for AirPods and other Bluetooth devices, including better sample rate management and more reliable device switching
  • Smarter Microphone Detection - The app now correctly filters out redundant microphones and no longer records iPhone or iPad as separate audio sources when connected

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed an issue where the meeting recording timer would start before the app was fully ready to record
  • Improved audio synchronization during meeting recordings for more reliable multi-track capture
  • Enhanced stability when switching between audio input devices during a session

Bug Fixes

  • Improved onboarding interview flow with better wording and more accurate context generation
  • Fixed an issue where meeting recordings could be lost if the app was quit or crashed during recording
  • Fixed missing meeting recordings caused by a race condition
  • Improved reliability of the dictation process so that individual failures no longer interrupt the entire workflow
  • General improvements to retry logic for more stable recording uploads
